name: test_vaccination_file_upload_nivs_disallow_flu_for_previous_years
description:
Test: Upload a NIVS historic flu vaccination file for previous years and verify
   it is disallowed.
Steps:
1. Upload a historic flu file for previous years.
Verification:
- Output indicates flu vaccinations for previous years are not allowed.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Upload a NIVS historic flu vaccination file for previous years and verify
it is disallowed.
Steps:

  1. Upload a historic flu file for previous years.
    Verification:
  • Output indicates flu vaccinations for previous years are not allowed.

testStage.description:
Test: Upload a NIVS historic flu vaccination file for previous years and verify
   it is disallowed.
Steps:
1. Upload a historic flu file for previous years.
Verification:
- Output indicates flu vaccinations for previous years are not allowed.
